loop1.title: Live Operations & Runtime
loop1.note: Showing live electrical vitals (power, current, voltage, frequency) — runtime, service countdown, and availability counts are not measured by this electrical meter.

loop1.title: Runtime & Duty
loop1.note: Showing average load percentage — run-hours and start counts are not measured by this asset's meter (R6/R14).

loop1.title: Energy & Reliability
loop1.note: Showing total active energy, apparent energy, and power factor — runtime and efficiency are not measured by this electrical meter.

loop1.title: Power Energy Analysis
loop1.note: Showing active, reactive, and apparent power/energy trends — readiness scores and thresholds are not measured by this electrical meter.
